summary: Closes WIN-012.c7 Hole 2 (moderate, cross-page BOU event-provenance inconsistency). Four atomic patches: P1 settles WIN-012 detail_evidence opening to BOU 2017 North American eclipse (aligning with Part 6.14 and dome's own live-power tile); P2 fixes residual '(BOU 2017 storm)' typo from EXP-401 compression; P3 replaces the now-orphaned 'single storm event' paragraph with a new paragraph surfacing the dome's own internal labeling inconsistency (live-power tile says 2017 eclipse, home-page Forensic Zoom chart says 2003 storm — same −10.9 nT, two different driving regimes); P4 appends one cross-reference sentence to Part 6.14 'How κ was derived' h3 pointing to the new WIN-012 inconsistency-surface. All four anchor BEFORE strings verified count=1 at authoring time. TLDRs, verdict, detail_verdict, finding, code_analysis unchanged. anticipated_objections engages WIN-058b storm-corollary defense head-on (two-pronged response: no first-principles derivation from disc geometry; numerical agreement of −10.9 nT in 2003 storm AND 2017 eclipse is parameter-fit residue absent independent derivation). Side observation flagged in unaddressed_holes_note for decider: duplicated Mansinha 2001 paragraph in Part 6.14 'What past SG data actually shows' h3 — NOT touched by this EXP but visible in the file.
